description: Review Engine — active recall, spaced repetition, review scheduling, daily revision, weak topic detection, progress tracking, and adaptive learning.

active_recall.description: Active recall questions embedded in content. Learner actively retrieves knowledge rather than passively re-reading.

spaced_repetition.description: SM-2 algorithm for scheduling review of learned concepts.

scoring.0: Complete blackout — reset interval to 1 day
scoring.1: Incorrect but remembered upon seeing answer — reset interval to 1 day
scoring.2: Incorrect but answer seemed easy to recall — keep current interval
scoring.3: Correct with serious difficulty — increase interval x1.2
scoring.4: Correct after hesitation — increase interval x ease_factor
scoring.5: Perfect response — increase interval x ease_factor x 1.3

weak_topic_detection.description: Identifies topics where learner struggles based on quiz performance, time spent, and hint requests.

signals.repeated_incorrect: Same question type answered incorrectly > 2 times

adaptive_learning.description: Future: adapts content difficulty, pace, and recommendations based on learner performance.
